data.title: Bedtime Stories - HeyKids
data.description:
Enjoy an amazing collection of bedtimes stories for children!

Our app is designed for curious little babies, toddlers, and preschoolers! Your child will enjoy lovely 3D animated fairy tales videos that will help them unleash their imagination and learn valuable moral lessons.

Carefully designed for children of all ages this application is ideal for an engaging, educational, visually and audibly exciting experience.

What you’ll love about HeyKids:
•	NO ADS, ensuring a safe environment for your children
•	OFFLINE VIDEO PLAYBACK.  Watch the videos anywhere you go, no internet connection required 
•	The most popular fairy tales with 3D animated videos
•	New stories for kids and cartoons added every month
•	Designed for kids - no unnecessary buttons, easy scrolling, and screen lock
•	Multiple settings available for parents
•	Preschool short stories that will make your child smile

Which is your favorite fairy tale? Here are just a few of the short stories and fairytales for children you can find in our app:

• Little Red Riding Hood
• Three Little Pigs
• The Ugly Duckling
• Wolf And The Seven Little Goats
• The Sleeping Beauty 
• and many more

For customer support, comments, or suggestion please contact us at contact@heykids.com

Do you like our app? Please rate us or write a review to tell us what you think.
